metadata.title: Yaver
metadata.description: Phone-first local dev MCP for Claude Code and Codex: install Yaver, pair mobile, run, build, deploy.

install.claude_code: claude mcp add --scope user yaver -- npx -y yaver-cli yaver-mcp
install.codex: codex mcp add yaver -- npx -y yaver-cli yaver-mcp
install.opencode: npm install -g yaver-cli && yaver mcp setup opencode
